privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for openclinica_env consolidate_duplicate_enrollment task by confirming that the subjects (DM-204 and DM-205) and study event ('Baseline Assessment') are synthetically generated via setup scripts, and verifying the exact required subject actions (remove DM-205, update DM-204), secondary ID ('MRN-88492'), and target event date ('2024-05-15') match the explicit instructions and verifier.py constraints.
